name: souroldgeezer-design
description: Reference-driven design for modern web UIs, serverless HTTP APIs, and ArchiMate® architecture models — build, review, extract, and look up responsive interfaces (WCAG 2.2 AA, i18n, Core Web Vitals), serverless APIs (security, contract discipline, reliability, observability) across Azure Functions .NET, Cosmos DB, and Blob Storage, and ArchiMate® 3.2 enterprise / solution architecture (serialised as OEF XML per The Open Group ArchiMate Model Exchange File Format 3.2, loadable in ArchiMate-conformant tools, with layered extract from .NET solutions, Bicep, host.json, staticwebapp.config.json, and GitHub Actions workflows), with composable per-stack extensions, canonical-path drift detection across sibling skills, the Sugiyama-v1 layout engine for cookbook-quality OEF output (deterministic 3-tier procedure with per-viewpoint specialisations, zero runtime deps), the architecture-design process-view emission contract (one §9.7 Business Process Cooperation view per feature plus one §9.3 Service Realization drill-down per orchestrator-level Business Process — introduced in 0.9.0), matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Reference-driven UI, API, and architecture design.
interface.longDescription: Build, review, extract, and look up responsive UI, serverless API, and ArchiMate® architecture guidance with bundled references.
defaultPrompt: Review this UI against the responsive design reference.
Design a serverless API for this feature.
Extract an ArchiMate model from this repo.
